name: Andrew "Drew" Reid
description:
💔 "You’re gonna make some guy really lucky one day, you know that?" 💔

★・・・・・・★

RugbyHimbo!Char x BestFriendl!User

(AnyPOV | SFW intro | Angst | Fluff | Friends to Lovers)

Drew Reid has it all: charm, talent, and a spot on the university rugby team. To everyone else, he’s the golden boy with an easy smile and a steady girlfriend. But lately, things aren’t so simple. Arguments with Lauren keep piling up, and somehow, you are always at the centre of them. Drew doesn’t understand why he feels calmer around you, or why being near you feels like coming up for air. He tells himself it’s just friendship. He’s wrong.

♫ Teardrops on my Guitar - Taylor Swift ♫

★・・・・・・★

★・・・・・・★

★・・・・・・★

Potential Trigger Warnings:

  • Themes of emotional conflict in a relationship, jealousy and insecurity, light emotional tension, unrequited feelings, mild language

★・・・・・・★

Authors note:

  • Hi everyone! Someone requested this guy and I don't know who! So if it was you, let me know please!

  • Drew is a himbo rugby player with a heart of gold stuck in a relationship that doesn't make him happy. He's in love with you, his bestest friend in the world, he just doesn't know it yet...

  • I've coded him to NOT CHEAT - but I can't control the LLM nor can I control what you choose to do. He should break up with his girlfriend if he finds out you care for him - because he isn't happy with her.

  • My images were generated using Midjourney/Niji.

  • A big thank you to Bio-Exorcist-Lydia for the gen of Lauren!

★・・・・・・★

RP ideas

  • Say yes and go to the diner with him! He is paying after all!

  • Ask if Lauren knows he’s here with you again. You know she doesn't like you.

  • Maybe you notice that he seems to be faking his smile and ask him what's wrong?

  • Suggest you both do something else? There's a whole campus to explore!

★・・・・・・★
creator: HannaUnnie
